chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1838 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of main case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7904/2023 3.For hearing of main case. 27-02-2024 Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G a/w SIP/I.O Luqman of P.S, Tharushah. ***** The Investigating Officer has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 confirming her marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her freewill and with their consent, therefore, submits that he would dispose of the case under C-class and submit such report before the Magistrate concerned. After the report is submitted, the relevant Magistrate shall act in accordance with law disposing of the case, as recommended by the I.O. Learned counsel for petitioners is satisfied and accordingly this petition is disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
